description: Michael Repetny from Marinade presents Marinade V2, a new liquid staking solution for Solana, addressing smart contract risks, validator issues, and hidden commissions.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Michael discusses the launch of Marinade V2, highlighting its non-custodial nature, protected staking rewards, and the new Stake Auction marketplace for maximizing yield on Solana [t=0:00-0:00].
